rationale.D1: Confirmed a library-grade generic MotorIO abstract base (lib/superstructure/MotorIO.java) with MotorTalonFX (hardware) and MotorSim (sim) implementations, swapped via RobotBase.isSimulation() in MotorSubsystem, reused across all mechanisms — discounted the absence of a null-object variant.
rationale.D2: Confirmed Superstructure has a real setGoal(SetpointGoal) API fanning goals to all mechanisms and ShooterHandler has an explicit NOT_READY→AIMING→FIRING FSM with guarded canTransitionToReady() — discounted any claim of graph/search-based coordination.
rationale.D3: Confirmed maple-sim drivetrain simulation (MapleSimSwerveDrivetrain using org.ironmaple), MotorSim trapezoid-profile simulation for all mechanism motors, and REPLAY mode wired in Robot.java — discounted as full level 4 because no replay IO variant classes exist to make replay the primary verification workflow.
rationale.D4: Confirmed 5 meaningful test files (ShooterPhysicsTest, ShooterSolverTests, ShotTableTest, JoystickTest) with 29 assertions testing shooter physics math, and ./gradlew build (CI) runs them — discounted as level 3 because tests cover only library math utilities, not sim-backed subsystem behavior construction.
rationale.D5: Confirmed AdvantageKit fully wired: LoggedRobot, Logger.start(), REAL/SIM/REPLAY mode switch in Robot.java, WPILOGWriter for match logging, and @AutoLogOutput + Logger.recordOutput spread across MotorIO, ShooterHandler, and Superstructure — discounted level 4 because no replay IO variants or FaultReporter are implemented.
rationale.D6: Confirmed custom BLine library (vendordep v0.8.4) used for all competition autos with kinematic constraints (4.5 m/s, 12 m/s²) and 11 named auto routines; PathPlanner files present but only FlippingUtil is imported, not AutoBuilder — discounted PathPlanner adoption; BLine is a closed-loop trajectory follower equivalent to PathPlanner level 2.
rationale.D7: Confirmed BOS class reads from 3 cameras via NetworkTables, calls drivetrain.addVisionMeasurement with per-measurement timestamp and tuned variance (VecBuilder.fill) for multi-camera fusion — discounted level 4 because no dedicated RobotState class or TimeInterpolatableBuffer; pose is stored in CTRE SwerveDrivetrain.
rationale.D8: Confirmed CONTRIBUTING.md with PR rules, branch naming, and test requirements; spotless formatter enforced (build fails without it per CONTRIBUTING.md); GitHub Actions CI runs ./gradlew build on push/PR; BLine-Lib is a versioned external dependency — discounted full level 4 because no generated docs or multi-robot variant structure evident.
